hero.title: Create Your Own Campaign Frame
hero.subtitle: A private twibbon platform for communities, organizations, and events. All campaigns are PRIVATE — accessible only via link.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three easy steps to create your twibbon campaign
howItWorks.step1Desc: Design your frame or background twibbon with our powerful canvas editor.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get a unique private link and share it only with the people you choose.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Supporters upload their photos and instantly download the twibbon result.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create professional twibbon campaigns
features.frameDesc: Transparent frame overlay on top of supporter photos. Perfect for branding campaigns.
features.bgDesc: Auto-remove photo background and merge with your campaign background design.
features.privateLinkDesc: Each campaign has a unique link accessible only by those who have it.
features.noAccountDesc: Supporters don't need to create an account. Just open the link, upload, and download.

privacy.title: Why TWIBO.id?
privacy.subtitle: Unlike other platforms, all campaigns on TWIBO.id are 100% private.
privacy.point1: Campaigns don't appear in public search
privacy.point3: Supporter data is safe and protected
privacy.point4: Full control over who can see your campaign

footer.tagline: Private twibbon platform for communities, organizations, and events.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free or upgrade to Premium for full features
